case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. YINLING L. SUNG et al

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, YINLING L.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $4,456.25 AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, YINLING L.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
